questions.question: What is the effective batch identity that gradient accumulation expresses?
questions.explanation: Micro batch is what fits in memory; accumulation steps are how many forward + backward passes pile gradients into the same buffer before one optimizer step.
questions.question_zh: 梯度累积表达的有效 batch 等式是?
questions.explanation_zh: Micro batch 是显存能装下的; accumulation steps 是把多少次 forward+backward 的梯度堆进同一个 buffer,然后才走一次 optimizer step。

questions.question: Why must the loss be divided by accum_steps before backward on each micro batch?
options: It makes the loss curve prettier
PyTorch sums gradients into param.grad by default, so without the division the accumulated gradient is N times too large and the optimizer step is N times too aggressive
It is required for mixed precision only
questions.explanation: The accumulation buffer is a sum. Per-micro-batch scaling by 1/N pushes that sum back into the same scale a single full-batch backward would produce.
questions.question_zh: 为什么每个 micro batch 的 loss 在 backward 前必须除以 accum_steps?
options_zh: PyTorch 默认把梯度累加到 param.grad,不除会让累积梯度大 N 倍,优化器步长也大 N 倍
只在 mixed precision 时需要
questions.explanation_zh: Accumulation buffer 是求和。把每个 micro batch 缩 1/N 把这个和拉回与一次完整 backward 相同的尺度。

questions.question: When does the optimizer step run inside the accumulation loop?
options: Only after the last micro batch in the accumulation window
questions.explanation: Stepping mid-accumulation contaminates every parameter the rest of the run depends on. The optimizer step fires once per effective batch.
questions.question_zh: 在累积循环中,optimizer step 何时运行?
options_zh: 每个 micro batch 之后
只在累积窗口的最后一个 micro batch 之后
每个窗口运行两次以保险
questions.explanation_zh: 在累积中途 step 会污染后续运行依赖的所有参数。每个 effective batch 触发一次 optimizer step。

questions.question: What does the no_sync context wrap on a real multi-GPU run?
options: The non-final micro batches, so the gradient all-reduce only fires after the last backward instead of N times
questions.explanation: DDP's no_sync skips the gradient collective. Wrapping all but the last micro batch turns N collectives per effective step into one.
questions.question_zh: 在真实多 GPU 运行中,no_sync 上下文包住的是?
options_zh: 非最终的 micro batch,使梯度 all-reduce 在最后一次 backward 后才触发,而不是 N 次
questions.explanation_zh: DDP 的 no_sync 跳过梯度集体通信。把除最后一个之外的 micro batch 都包住,可把每个 effective step 的 N 次集体调用变成一次。

questions.question: What does the equivalence_check function in main.py assert?
options: That a single full-batch backward and an accum_steps chunked backward with loss / N produce the same gradient buffer and the same post-step parameters up to a small tolerance
questions.explanation: The assertion bound is max-abs-diff under 1e-4. Without the loss scaling the diff blows up; with the scaling it sits at floating point noise.
questions.question_zh: main.py 中 equivalence_check 函数断言的是?
options_zh: 完整 batch 的一次 backward,与按 accum_steps 切块、loss/N 后的 backward,在梯度 buffer 与 step 后的参数上数值差在小容忍范围内一致
questions.explanation_zh: 断言界限是 max-abs-diff 小于 1e-4。不做 loss 缩放时差别会爆炸; 做了之后就是浮点噪声。

questions.question: Reading the throughput against effective batch curve, what stays roughly constant and what scales?
options: Samples per second drops with larger effective batch
Samples per second saturates near the hardware limit while wall time per optimizer step scales linearly with accum_steps; optimizer steps per second is what falls
Both metrics scale linearly with accum
Throughput goes up because the model gets faster
questions.explanation: Each micro batch costs the same forward + backward. Accumulation buys statistical smoothing per optimizer step, not raw throughput; the curve is a useful reality check against folklore.
questions.question_zh: 看「吞吐 vs 有效 batch」曲线,什么大致不变,什么会变?
options_zh: samples/second 随更大 effective batch 下降
samples/second 趋近硬件极限保持稳定; 而每次 optimizer step 的 wall time 与 accum_steps 成线性关系; 下降的是 optimizer steps/second
两个指标都随 accum 线性变化
因为模型变快,吞吐增加
questions.explanation_zh: 每个 micro batch 的 forward+backward 成本相同。累积换来的是每 optimizer step 更多统计平滑,而不是裸吞吐; 这条曲线是对民间说法的现实校验。
